Container.Name: photo-tagger
Container.Overview: AI-powered Nextcloud photo tagger using Ollama (Moondream/Gemma3/LLaVA). Scans photos via WebDAV, analyzes with local AI, writes system tags back. Includes photo-frame candidate selection and Nextcloud Recognize integration.

Config.Name: Nextcloud URL
Config.Description: Full URL to your Nextcloud instance

Config.Name: Nextcloud Username
Config.Description: Nextcloud username

Config.Name: Nextcloud App Password
Config.Description: App password from Nextcloud Settings > Security > Devices & sessions

Config.Name: Photo Root Path
Config.Description: Folder path in Nextcloud to scan for photos

Config.Name: Nextcloud DB Host
Config.Description: MariaDB host for Recognize integration. Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Nextcloud DB Port
Config.Description: MariaDB port

Config.Name: Nextcloud DB User
Config.Description: Read-only DB user for Recognize tables

Config.Name: Nextcloud DB Password
Config.Description: DB password

Config.Name: Nextcloud DB Name
Config.Description: Nextcloud database name

Config.Name: Ollama URL
Config.Description: Ollama API endpoint

Config.Name: Vision Model
Config.Description: Ollama vision model for photo analysis

Config.Name: Normalizer Model
Config.Description: Model for metadata normalization. Set same as vision model to skip second pass.

Config.Name: Ollama Keep Alive
Config.Description: How long Ollama keeps model loaded

Config.Name: Wait for Idle Ollama
Config.Description: Wait when Ollama is busy with other models

Config.Name: Idle Poll Seconds
Config.Description: Seconds between idle checks

Config.Name: Unload Between Phases
Config.Description: Unload model between vision and normalization

Config.Name: Frame Selection Enabled
Config.Description: Enable photo-frame candidate selection

Config.Name: Frame Percent
Config.Description: Percentage of photos per directory to select

Config.Name: Frame Max Per Directory
Config.Description: Maximum frame candidates per directory

Config.Name: Frame Hash Threshold
Config.Description: Perceptual hash distance threshold (lower = stricter dedup)

Config.Name: Frame Tag
Config.Description: System tag for frame candidates

Config.Name: Frame Rejected Tag
Config.Description: System tag for rejected candidates

Config.Name: Person Tagging Enabled
Config.Description: Tag photos with person names from Recognize face clusters

Config.Name: Person Tag Prefix
Config.Description: Prefix for person tags

Config.Name: Skip Recognize Tagged
Config.Description: Skip AI tagging for photos already classified by Recognize

Config.Name: Continuous Mode
Config.Description: Keep running and scan periodically

Config.Name: Scan Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds between scan cycles in continuous mode

Config.Name: Batch Size
Config.Description: Photos per batch

Config.Name: Run Limit
Config.Description: Max photos to process per cycle (0 = unlimited)

Config.Name: HTTP Timeout
Config.Description: HTTP request timeout in seconds

Config.Name: Sleep Between Requests (ms)
Config.Description: Milliseconds between API requests

Config.Name: Sleep Between Batches (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds between batches

Config.Name: Force Reprocess
Config.Description: Re-analyze all photos (resets after first cycle)

Config.Name: Dry Run
Config.Description: List candidates without processing

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: SQLite database and lock file storage
